description_long: This is a military combat vehicle with a low, angular profile and a rotating turret mounted centrally on its chassis. The vehicle is covered in a mottled camouflage pattern consisting of brown, tan, and green hues, designed to blend into natural environments. It features a long, slender cannon extending from the turret, with additional details such as hatches, periscopes, and reinforced armor plating visible on the upper surfaces. The vehicle moves on six large, rugged road wheels on each side, connected by continuous tracks for enhanced mobility over rough terrain. The front of the vehicle is sloped for deflection and protection, while the rear includes storage compartments and exhaust outlets. The overall construction appears robust, with thick armor and functional design elements typical of armored fighting vehicles.
description: A camouflaged armored combat vehicle with a rotating turret, long cannon, and rugged tracked wheels, designed for military use. Its exterior is covered in brown and green camouflage and reinforced with thick, sloped armor plating.
description_view_0: The left-front view highlights the long cannon, sloped front armor, and the left-side tracks with six visible road wheels.
description_view_1: The right-rear view shows the rear storage compartments, exhaust outlets, and the right-side tracks, with the turret and cannon extending forward.
description_view_2: The front view emphasizes the sloped frontal armor, central turret, and the symmetrical arrangement of the tracks and wheels.
description_view_3: The left-rear view displays the rear armor, storage features, and the full length of the cannon extending forward from the turret.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted on the central turret; no other weapon mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped armor plating; reinforced turret and front glacis; no modular or reactive panels visible.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Woodland camouflage pattern with irregular patches of brown, tan, and green in a disruptive style.
